untranslatable_reason: Signal requires position delta tracking, strike price alignment analysis, and dynamic position inversion monitoring—these are options/derivatives-specific metrics not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal depends on spread-specific Greeks (delta), inside exercise price levels, and max profit zone calculations that cannot be expressed using only price action and standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally about options spread construction and Greeks-based position management. The core concepts (butterfly spreads, inside exercise prices, delta inversion, max profit zones) operate in derivatives space and require real-time Greeks calculations and strike price relationships. Attempted partial translation using price position proxies, but true implementation requires options analytics library integration.
